text_jp:
貴様がうわさに聞く
仮面ライダー第１号か{END}
text_en: Kamen Rider... you are here too!{END}
Who are you!?{END}
We have to stop them here.{END}

text_jp:
ちょうど良い、
おもしろい物をご覧に入れよう{END}
text_en: We have to stop them here.{END}
What is going on here?{END}
What is going on here?{END}

text_jp:
生体改造を受ける者は頭脳、体力共に
優れた者でなければならない　{END}
text_en: We have to stop them here.{END}

text_jp:
不完全な人間どもにその資質を
求める事など、そもそも間違いなのだ{END}
text_en: We have to stop them here.{END}

text_jp:
ならば、完全な資質を持った
肉体を造るまでの事{END}
text_en: We have to stop them here.{END}
We have to stop them here.{END}

text_jp: 死ぬ前に見せてやろう{END}
text_en: We have to stop them here.{END}

text_jp:
間もなくこやつらで
生体改造ビールスの実験を行う{END}
text_en: We have to stop them here.{END}
What is going on here?{END}

text_jp:
この実験が成功すれば、もはや
素体となる人間を捕まえる必要はない{END}
text_en: We have to stop them here.{END}

text_jp:
この完全な肉体全てに
生体改造ビールスを注入すればいいのだ{END}
text_en: We have to stop them here.{END}

text_jp: …どうだ、素晴らしいと思わんか{END}
text_en: We have to stop them here.{END}
We have to stop them here.{END}
We have to stop them here.{END}

text_jp:
もうじきその中は改造人間の肉体組織を
破壊するアンドロガスで満たされる{END}
text_en: We have to stop them here.{END}
We have to stop them here.{END}

text_jp: …お前はそこで溶けて無くなるのだ！{END}
text_en: We have to stop them here.{END}

text_jp: 実験の準備は出来たか！？{END}
text_en: What is going on here?{END}

text_jp: 何をしている！報告せんか！{END}
text_en: What is going on here?{END}
What is going on here?{END}

text_jp: お前の望みは何ひとつ葉わない！{END}
text_en: What is going on here?{END}

text_jp: むぅ…おのれ一文字隼人…やれっ！{END}
text_en: We have to stop them here.{END}
Hah!{END}
We have to stop them here.{END}
We have to stop them here.{END}
What is going on here?{END}
...Ichimonji{END}
We have to stop them here.{END}
We have to stop them here.{END}
We have to stop them here.{END}

text_jp:
…閉じ込められた
作業員を助けださなければ…{END}
text_en: The workers are being controlled.{END}
Hongo!{END}

text_jp:
俺は大丈夫だ。それよりも
作業員を…彼等を頼む！{END}
text_en: The workers are being controlled.{END}
We have to stop them here.{END}
